content.en:
Ye Tian copied the Life Magnetic Beast many times, and the resources consumed by copying the Life Magnetic Beast alone reached a very exaggerated level.

If it is replaced by a real life magnetic beast, I don't know how many have been sacrificed.

If you were the top force, you wouldn't be able to do this, after all, there weren't so many Life Magnetic Beasts.

However, Ye Tian could only copy the half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life magnetic beast, so the effect was getting worse and worse, but it was effective.

But now, the Life Magnet Beast really has no effect at all!

"Let's test the life level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He used the treasures of the Ancient Spring Xuanlou to test his life level, and after some testing, the results came out.

【9.6】

Seeing this result, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

The life level has reached 9.6, which means that he is very close to 9.9!

"There is only 0.3 left in the distance, and if you try harder, you may be able to reach 9.9!"

But Ye Tian also knew very well that there was only one creature like the Life Magnetic Beast, so he couldn't find such an opportunity again!

Even if it is a treasure that helps you improve your life level, it needs to be refined to have an effect, and even if it is copied, it cannot be used for refining.

Therefore, it is useless to copy those treasures to improve the level of life, and the integrity of the treasures must be guaranteed.

In the following days, Ye Tian searched for a lot of treasures, but few treasures could improve his life level, even if there were really ones, the effect was very poor and poor, and he couldn't raise his life level from 9.6 to 9.7 at all, which made Ye Tian feel that if there was no great opportunity, he was afraid that it would take endless years to hope to raise his life level to the level of 9.9.

"I can only take my time and see what opportunities there are!"

Ye Tian thought so.

......

Archean Plains boundary.

At this time, Ye Tian's disciple Han Xuan had already stepped into the peak realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

After all, she was a half-step sevenfold ancestor in her previous life, and now she is apprenticed to Ye Tian, and she is not short of resources, so her cultivation speed is very fast.

It didn't take long for him to become a Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and with a large amount of resources, he quickly ascended to the peak realm of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

Not only that, but she was only one step away from the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

She only needs to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao before she can impact the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

Now, she has comprehended the prototype of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and she is almost close to comprehending the true Ninefold Yuan Dao.

Another period of time has passed.

On this day, Han Xuan finally comprehended his own Ninefold Yuan Dao, and began to refine his body, trying to break the boundaries of the first time.

Once the break is successful, she can become a half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

With continuous refining and resource supply, Han Xuan's body became stronger and stronger, and finally broke the boundary and stepped into the half-step sevenfold ancestor realm.

"The breakthrough has been successful!"

Han Xuan was very excited.

Although she had only broken through to a half-step sevenfold ancestor, her strength had already surpassed the peak of her previous life.

With her current strength, she could easily beat an ordinary top-level half-step sevenfold ancestor.

On this day, Han Xuan came to meet his master Ye Tian.

"Master, I want to return to the Hanhai District!"

Han Xuan said.

"Okay, I'll take you there!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Master!" Han Xuan nodded.

Immediately, Han Xuan followed one of Ye Tian's replica bodies back to the Hanhai District Boundary.

In fact, she didn't know that Ye Tian had multiple duplicate bodies, thinking that Ye Tian's body was a refined clone, so she didn't think much about it.

However, the materials for refining the clone are very precious, and she doesn't have them.

Xinggu Giant City.

Han Xuan followed Ye Tian here.

"Master, you can give me a piece of the Xuanyu Order, and I will join the Xuanyu Pavilion directly. Han Xuan said.

"No need, you just follow me in!" Ye Tiandao.

Soon.

Han Xuan followed Ye Tian to this branch of Xuanyu Pavilion, and Xuanhuang Daozu personally came to see Ye Tian.

Seeing Xuanhuang Daozu, Han Xuan was extremely shocked.

She naturally knew Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor, she was the pavilion master of the Xuanyu Pavilion, and she was also the high-level of Xuanyu Pavilion, and she was a powerhouse at the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor!

Such a strong person actually came out to see Ye Tian in person, how could she not be shocked?

"Master, it's still a half-step sevenfold ancestor realm, how can you have such a big face?" Han Xuan was puzzled.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, this is ......"

Xuanhuang Daozu looked at Han Xuan and asked suspiciously.

"It's my disciple, I will arrange it in the Xuanyu Pavilion in the future, and the treatment will be better, no problem, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"No problem!"

Xuanhuang Daozu immediately agreed.

He now knew Ye Tian's identity very well, he was an official member of the Nine-Fold Building, and he learned from the Pavilion Master of the Xuanyu Pavilion that Ye Tian's current status in the Nine-Fold Building was very high, even the half-step Eightfold Ancestors of the Hanhai District Realm would not dare to offend Ye Tian!

His strength is now stronger than Ye Tian, but in terms of status, it is far inferior to Ye Tian!

Soon, Xuanhuang Daozu arranged Han Xuan and gave him very good treatment, and even gave a lot of rewards.

And Ye Tian didn't stay here for long, and left soon.

After Ye Tian left, Han Xuan asked Xuanhuang Daozu for advice.

"Xuanhuang Pavilion Master, why are you so polite to my master, could it be that my master's status in the Xuanyu Pavilion is very high?" Han Xuan asked curiously.

Xuanhuang Daozu hurriedly said nervously: "Han Xuan Daozu, your master is only in the Xuanyu Pavilion now, not a member of the Xuanyu Pavilion, he is now a member of the Nine-Story Building, and his status is much higher than mine!"

"Nine-story building?"

Han Xuan was a little confused, she didn't know about the existence of the Nine-Story Building, after all, her status in her previous life was very low, how could she know about the existence of the Nine-Story Building!

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor saw that Han Xuan didn't know about the Nine-Story Building, so he simply explained: "The Nine-Story Building is a very powerful force, spread across all the regional boundaries, and there is also a branch in the Hanhai District Boundary, named Hanhai Yellow Building. And many of the top powerhouses in the Hanhai District are peripheral members of the Hanhai Yellow Building, and they are not even qualified as official members. Among the peripheral members of the Nine-Story Building, there were a large number of half-step Eightfold Ancestors and even Eightfold Ancestors. And your master is one of the official members, and it is said that the status is very high, and the future potential is unlimited!"

When Han Xuan heard this, she gasped!

"How do you join the Nine-Story Building?"

Han Xuan is a little excited!

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor said: "In the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao and reach a life level of 6 or above, you can join the Nine-Fold Building." However, there are also many Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the Hanhai District Realm, but in the recent years, only your master has successfully joined the Nine-Fold Building, and other Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao are not qualified to join. "

"I see!"

Han Xuan suddenly understood that the requirements for wanting to join the Nine Floors were too high.

She had heard of many Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and heard about their terrible achievements and deeds, and she was extremely admired in her previous life, but she didn't expect that even those Dao Ancestors were not qualified to join the Nine-Fold Building.

"My master is too wicked!"

Han Xuan sighed secretly.
